name: Slow Cooker Tamale Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring broth or bouillon to a boil in a medium saucepan.
2. Stirring constantly, slowly add cornmeal. Simmer the mixture for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. Stir in cilantro. Grease a spatula and spread the cornmeal mixture on the bottom and up the sides of the slow cooker by about 2 inches.
4. In a large bowl, combine sausage, stew meat, onion, celery, chile pepper, sun-dried tomatoes, corn, sliced olives, salt, and pepper.
5. Carefully spoon the filling into the center of the cornmeal-lined pot.
6. Cover and cook on LOW for 7-8 hours.
7. Garnish with ripe olives, if desired.
